Plaintiff Louis Ng'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patrick Kelly, Esq., Snell & Wilmer, Telephone 213-929-2533, appearing for Plaintiffs;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Louis Ng's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. Mr. Ng has shown that he has validly served defendant Hee Shun Hudson by substitute service on the security guard at Mr. Hudson's residence. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Plaintiff Louis Ng'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Louis Ng's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Continued to December 19, 2018 as determined at the December 3, 2018 hearing and reflected in the minutes of the December hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: William Trupek, Not Reported (302/HEK)

Plaintiff Louis Ng'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Kelly, Esq. 213-929-2533 of Snell & Wilmer LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The court inquires re: the declaration of the process server. Plaintiff reports he has a proof of sevice with more details. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Louis Ng'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Continued to 12/10/18 to file an amended proof of service. Brief memo is due on 12/7/18. The Court also holds off on the request for entry of default till 12/19/18.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Kelly, Esq. 213-929-2533 of Snell & Wilmer for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his views re: proof of service. Plaintiff reports status of proof of service, no opposition on the proof and submits a copy to the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF LOUIS NG'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Continued to December 3, 2018 for the Court to look at the proof of service. Plaintiff does not need to serve again.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
